title: UltimateArena
description: UltimateArena is the ultimate PvP plugin for thrilling 1v1 duels! Challenge your friends, climb the leaderboard, and prove who’s the true champion! 🏆
body:
# 🥊 UltimateArena – Epic 1v1 Duels Plugin ⚔️

🔥 **UltimateArena** is the ultimate PvP plugin for thrilling **1v1 duels** in a configurable arena! Challenge your friends, climb the leaderboard, and prove who’s the true champion! 🏆

## 💥 Features
- ⚔️ **/duel <player>** – Challenge another player to a 1v1 fight!
- 🏗️ **/ultimatearena setup** – Easy arena setup through an intuitive GUI!  
  ➤ Click on the **red wool** blocks to save key arena positions.  
  ➤ When all wool blocks turn **green**, the arena is fully configured and ready! ✅
- 🧠 **Smart leaderboard** hologram showing the top duelers!  
- 💾 Saves arena data and stats automatically.

## 🛡️ Permissions
- `ultimatearena.use` – Required to use the **/duel** command.
- `ultimatearena.admin` – Required to use the **/ultimatearena setup** command.

## 🧪 Perfect for:
- 🎮 PvP Servers
- 🏹 Minigames Hubs
- 🧱 Survival Arenas

---

🔥 **Dominate the arena. Claim your place at the top.**  
Install **UltimateArena** and let the duels begin! 🩸
